description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a solid rectangular frame and two large, round back cushions. The seat is a single, flat cushion that spans the width of the sofa, while the armrests are thick, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest. The upholstery appears to be a textured fabric in muted gray and taupe tones, giving the sofa a contemporary yet understated look. The legs are not distinctly visible, suggesting a block or hidden leg design that emphasizes the sofa's geometric form. The overall construction appears sturdy, with ample seating space for two to three people. This sofa would be suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces, such as parks, plazas, or waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with two round back cushions, thick straight armrests, and textured gray and taupe upholstery. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing two round back cushions, a single seat cushion, and thick, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the backrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, continuous backrest with no visible cushions or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, round back cushions and a single, flat seat cushion; all cushions appear loose and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, straight armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not distinctly visible, likely block or hidden legs integrated into the corners for a solid, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation; features two attached or resting round cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a visibly textured, matte fabric; no decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
